description: Configure a secure service connection for the legacy inventory system in the TailwindTraders project. Create a 'Generic' service connection named 'LegacyInventorySystem' using the Server URL 'https://inventory.local/api/v1', Username 'svc_ado_connect', and Password 'Complex!88Password'. Include the description 'Connection to legacy mainframe for inventory sync' and ensure access permission is granted to all pipelines.
